artifact_identity.producer: scripts/build_views.py via aoa_stats_builder.surface_catalog from source-owned receipts and bounded examples
artifact_identity.consumer_expectation: consumers verify schema_version, generated_from, validation_refs, surface strength refs, owner truth inputs, and build_views --check before using catalog entries as observability hints
artifact_identity.privacy_boundary: public derived summary refs only; no raw private receipts, session captures, owner payload bodies, or runtime-local evidence
artifact_identity.content_identity: generated/summary_surface_catalog.min.json rebuilt from the active receipt feed and compared by build_views --check

deferred_contract_surfaces.name: antifragility_vector
deferred_contract_surfaces.activation_condition: Activate only after one owner-linked repeated-window receipt family and bounded eval chain exist for the same stressor family.
deferred_contract_surfaces.authority_ceiling: Even after activation this surface stays weaker than owner-local stressor receipts and bounded eval reports.

surfaces.name: core_skill_application_summary
surfaces.primary_question: Which project-core kernel skills are actually finishing and how often, without inferring usage from general receipt volume?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate core_skill_application_receipt payloads by kernel_id and skill_name
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local skill execution records and any reviewed owner closeout.

surfaces.name: object_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How often and how broadly is each source object showing up in the current receipt feed?
surfaces.derivation_rule: group receipts by object_ref and keep counts, latest timestamps, and bounded posture flags
owner_truth_inputs: owner-local receipts across the active registry
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than the owner repos named in object_ref and weaker than any linked evidence surface.

surfaces.name: candidate_lineage_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How far are reviewed growth-refinery candidates actually moving without turning stats into routing or proof authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed-only candidate_lineage_entries carried on harvest_packet_receipt payloads into stage, owner-target, posture, misroute, supersession, and time-to-stage summaries
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than reviewed owner-local lineage records and any owner landing surface.

surfaces.name: owner_landing_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What owner-landing posture is represented by the committed receipt examples without claiming that an owner-local publisher has landed those candidates?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate committed reviewed owner-landing and source-route compatibility trace receipt examples into a bounded reference summary until real owner-local publishers exist
owner_truth_inputs: aoa-stats/stats/intake-contract/examples/session_harvest_family.receipts.example.json committed owner-landing compatibility receipts; no current stronger publisher
future owner-local landing status surfaces and receipts
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local status surfaces, reviewed landing bundles, and owner repository decisions.

surfaces.name: supersession_drop_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What pruning, replacement, merge, and reanchor signals are explicit across reviewed growth-refinery receipts without inventing reasons or ranking authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed candidate-lineage entries, reviewed owner-landing payloads, and source-route compatibility trace payloads into explicit turnover summaries
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than reviewed turnover records and any owner-local acceptance or rejection rationale.

surfaces.name: repeated_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What admitted receipt activity was observed in each bounded date window without inferring change, recurrence, or one global score?
surfaces.derivation_rule: group admitted receipts by the calendar-date prefix of observed_at and conserve per-window receipt, object, event-kind, selected-event, and evidence-ref counts
owner_truth_inputs: owner-local receipts across the active registry
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than the underlying receipt feed and any owner-local chronology or closeout record.

surfaces.name: route_progression_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded multi-axis movement is visible on each named route?
surfaces.derivation_rule: project the committed legacy numeric progression receipt fixture by route_ref, reject semantic-only axis_delta_summary payloads instead of inventing scores, sum the fixed seven-axis numeric values, and normalize the latest verdict to a non-empty string
owner_truth_inputs: Agents-of-Abyss RPG center progression vocabulary and stop-lines
aoa-sdk typed progression and checkpoint-carry contracts
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than current aoa-skills semantic receipts, the RPG center vocabulary, aoa-agents progression meaning, aoa-sdk contracts, and owner-local route decisions; this legacy numeric snapshot is not live progression truth.

surfaces.name: fork_calibration_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How are route forks actually being chosen and how often do they carry realized outcome refs?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate decision_fork_receipt payloads by route_ref and chosen_branch
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local route selection and any reviewed followthrough outcome.

surfaces.name: session_growth_branch_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What reviewed next-kernel branches are being recommended after closeout without turning stats into route authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate reviewed followthrough hints carried on decision_fork_receipt payloads into next-skill, owner-target, posture, defer, and reason-code counts
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than any owner-local route fork, playbook, or approval surface.

surfaces.name: automation_pipeline_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How close is a named automation pipeline to seed-ready bounded use?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate automation_candidate_receipt payloads by pipeline_ref and readiness flags
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local approval, playbook, and runtime rollout surfaces.

surfaces.name: automation_followthrough_summary
surfaces.primary_question: How far are reviewed automation candidates moving through bounded follow-through without implying scheduler authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate automation_candidate_receipt payloads into seed-ready, defer, checkpoint, playbook-seed, real-run-review, and blocker counts
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local automation approval, runtime execution, and reviewed followthrough surfaces.

surfaces.name: codex_plane_deployment_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded shared-root Codex Plane deployment posture is represented by the committed 8Dionysus owner-example chain without letting stats overrule deploy-local trust or rollout evidence?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one committed reference snapshot from the 8Dionysus trust-state, regeneration-report, and rollout-receipt examples without treating those fixtures as current deploy-local state or a live fallback
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than deploy-local workspace-root trust state, regeneration reports, rollout receipts, live doctor or verify outcomes, and source-owner validation.

surfaces.name: codex_rollout_operations_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded rollout campaign posture is represented by the checked-in trusted owner history without turning stats into current deployment or rollout authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive bounded historical rollout state counts and the source-owned latest pointer from the exact four checked-in 8Dionysus generated/codex/rollout surfaces
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned rollout history and rollback windows.

surfaces.name: codex_rollout_drift_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded drift and rollback posture is represented by the latest pointer inside the checked-in trusted owner history without replacing source-owned campaign truth?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive the historical drift window, drift state, explicit repair-attempt posture, and descriptive rollback requirement from the exact four checked-in 8Dionysus rollout-history surfaces
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned drift reviews, rollback windows, and campaign history.

surfaces.name: rollout_campaign_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded campaign cadence posture is represented by the committed 8Dionysus owner-example chain without turning stats into current cadence authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one committed reference summary from the 8Dionysus rollout-campaign, drift-review, and rollback-followthrough examples without claiming freshness against current checked-in history
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned campaign cadence and review decisions.

surfaces.name: drift_review_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What named drift signals and explicit review decision are represented by the committed 8Dionysus cadence examples without replacing rollout or campaign truth?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one committed reference drift-review summary from the 8Dionysus rollout-campaign, drift-review, and rollback-followthrough examples while keeping rollback readiness descriptive only
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned drift reviews, campaign windows, and rollback decisions.

surfaces.name: continuity_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded self-agency continuity posture is represented by the committed cross-owner reference chain without turning stats into continuity truth or self-agency proof?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one committed reference snapshot from an aoa-agents continuity-window example, the experimental aoa-playbooks continuity cycle, an aoa-memo provenance-thread example, and draft continuity anchors in the aoa-evals catalog
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than an owner-runtime continuity artifact or receipt, resolvable anchor evidence, reviewed memo writeback, activated playbook verdict, and real eval reports.

surfaces.name: component_refresh_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded component refresh posture is represented by the reviewed aoa-sdk reference chain without letting stats become refresh truth or maintenance authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one committed reference snapshot from reviewed aoa-sdk example drift hints and followthrough decisions while keeping owner validation and runtime receipts stronger
owner_truth_inputs: aoa-sdk authored component drift hint examples
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner repo refresh law, owner validation, and real regeneration evidence.

surfaces.name: memory_movement_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What reviewed aoa-memo corpus and landing movement is represented by the committed owner-corpus snapshot without making stats the owner of memory truth?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive one committed corpus, recall, KAG-lift, intake, and landing snapshot from the exact aoa-memo reviewed-object, min-catalog, reviewed-intake, and landing-receipt roots
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than aoa-memo reviewed memory objects, landing receipts, and source refs.

surfaces.name: titan_incarnation_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded Titan incarnation seed posture is visible without making stats the owner of Titan identity or gates?
surfaces.derivation_rule: derive fixed seed counts from the landed Titan XV owner surfaces and keep source receipt refs explicit
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than Dionysus seed lineage, aoa-agents role identity, aoa-sdk runtime helpers, and owner review evidence.

surfaces.name: titan_summon_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What seed-level Titan summon/report/finding/memory-candidate pressure is visible without making stats the owner of swarm ledger truth?
surfaces.derivation_rule: publish the Sixteenth Wave seed summary until owner-local Titan swarm ledgers and closeout receipts provide a live feed
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than Titan swarm ledgers, closeout audits, owner-local reports, and bounded eval verdicts.

surfaces.name: runtime_closeout_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded runtime closeout posture does the committed historical wave-receipt snapshot represent, and how did its reviewed handoff land?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate only historical runtime_wave_closeout_receipt payloads by program_id and wave_id and keep the latest gate plus handoff posture without aliasing current trial or return contracts
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than Checkpoint center law, historical owner wave records, and current trial or return contracts; this compatibility snapshot does not describe current runtime closeout state.

surfaces.name: stress_recovery_window_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded Stress Recovery posture is represented by the committed draft eval example without presenting it as a current repeated-window proof family?
surfaces.derivation_rule: resolve the committed aoa-stress-recovery-window example receipt to its draft aoa-evals example report and derive one reference summary plus suppression posture
owner_truth_inputs: future activated aoa-evals stress-recovery receipts and reports
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local stressor receipts, bounded eval reports, and route-owner recovery guidance.

surfaces.name: source_coverage_summary
surfaces.primary_question: Which owner repos and receipt families are actually entering the active stats feed, and where is the stats layer still blind?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate active receipts by object_ref.repo and event_kind, then compare observed owners against the configured live source registry when present
owner_truth_inputs: owner-local receipts across the active registry
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than the owner-local receipt logs and weaker than the live source registry it audits.

surfaces.name: surface_detection_summary
surfaces.primary_question: What second-wave surface-detection signals are accumulating without turning stats into routing authority?
surfaces.derivation_rule: aggregate advisory surface_detection_context payloads on finish-stage core_skill_application_receipt envelopes by observed date
surfaces.authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local route decisions and weaker than aoa-sdk or aoa-routing dispatch surfaces.
